title: The Tram Full of Cakes
originalityStatement: An original comic chase benchmark set on a municipal tram, created for pattern-selection testing.

storyModel.premise: A courier on a runaway catering tram reroutes switches, protects unstable cakes, and recruits passengers while trying to reach a festival square.
protectedCanon: The final cake survives only if two earlier passenger favors were completed

productProfile.spatialBudget: branching tram network and three short stop maps
